understanding.mechanics_understanding: Selectable pieces could be switched between by CLICKing their grid coordinates. Once selected, CLICKing another empty grid coordinate would cause the piece to quickly jump/teleport to that location, provided the path was not blocked. Obstacles and other pieces could block movement. Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT, etc.) did not move the selected piece; only CLICK commands caused position changes. The step budget limited total actions per level.
